Chicago Fed National Activity Index

The CFNAI is a monthly index designed to gauge overall economic activity and related inflationary pressure.

Date CFNAI CFNAI-MA3 Production & Income Employment, Unemployment & Hours Personal Consumption & Housing Sales, Orders & Inventories
